scope: Per-provider cost tracker facade, active sidecar binding, cost summary hook fallback, and resume-safe session total restoration

requiredBehaviors: expose donor-shaped process getters without creating a second token or dollar accumulator
delegate live totals to the active CostSidecar
return safe zero defaults when no active sidecar is bound
carry detached line counters into the sidecar when binding happens after line accounting
edgeCases: stale disposer from an older sidecar

requiredBehaviors: route API and VCR token-dollar producers into the active CostSidecar
preserve explicit API-computed USD cost instead of recomputing it differently
record cache read/write token totals and explicit cache-aware API cost from the migrated facade
route API duration including retry and without-retry timings into the sidecar
edgeCases: producer runs before a sidecar is active
API logging duration and turn_complete duration both occur for one turn
cache metrics are unavailable for a provider

requiredBehaviors: restore a matching persisted session into the current sidecar
remove the restored record from loaded lifetime totals before treating it as current-session baseline
replace the restored session record on shutdown instead of appending a duplicate
preserve duration, API duration, line counters, aggregate legacy totals, and per-provider model buckets
edgeCases: repeated restore of the same session id
restore attempted after current in-memory usage already exists
malformed nested modelUsage rows from a previous cost-totals file

requiredBehaviors: bootstrap binds the active CostSidecar for status-line cost getters
shutdown clears the active binding so future getters do not read stale sessions
the hook fallback does not add a duplicate exit listener while bootstrap owns the active CostSidecar summary
status-line cost input reads AgenC-owned cost/tracker.ts instead of the upstream mirror
edgeCases: fallback hook with no active sidecar
fallback hook registered before bootstrap binds a sidecar
live tree import scan for retired cost-tracker mirror imports
retired upstream cost mirror files deleted
